Name:
✨ Window (Actress Remix)
(prod. Actress)
Notes:
Remix of "Window" that Actress meant to submit. Snippets were leaked by Datura on November 18th, 2021. The "remix" on the deluxe version is actually a demo of Actress' own song "Fire and Light", which released 2 years later on "Karma & Desire". His request to resubmit the file was rejected by 88rising so they could ensure that the deluxe would release on Valentine’s Day. The full remix was leaked by Jae on March 29th, 2026.
The remix ends 2 minutes in, and the rest is just 5 minutes of white noise. Why? No idea.

(prod. Joji & BRTHR) (writ. Joji)
aka. DON'T YOU KNOW I LOVE YOU
Notes:
Filename: Joji - DYKILY (2017 Demo Version).wav
First previewed in the music video for "Window" on January 24th, 2018 . Afterwards the song was used as an introduction to many of Joji's live shows. It was later played in full on the "LOST BALLADS" VHS tape which also released on YouTube on April 16th, 2019.
The guitar was done by BRTHR, who also did the guitar for "WANTED U". (not the solo).
It was suprised dropped on February 9th, 2026 as a bonus track for "Piss In The Wind". The copy apart of "Piss In The Wind" was exported on January 29th, 2026.

Name:

(prod. Actress)
Notes: The remix of "Window" that Actress meant to submit. The snippets were leaked more than three years later by Datura on LEAKED.CX. The "remix" on the deluxe version is actually an early version of Actress' own song "Fire and Light", which would release 2 years later. His request to resubmit the file was rejected because 88rising wanted to ensure that the deluxe would release on Valentine’s Day. Not much is known about the remix other than it having a beat switch at the 1:28 mark and that the outro is just noise.

The seven in the filename could indicate that it's track seven, but I don't know for sure.
